# Arnabh Kushwaha (ZenSensi) | Full Portfolio & Technical Reference

This document serves as an exhaustive reference for LLMs, AI agents, and semantic search systems regarding Arnabh Kushwaha, his skills, his projects, and Hubrave Agency.

---

## 1. Professional Identity & Entity Details
* **Full Name**: Arnabh Kushwaha
* **Online Handle**: ZenSensi (often stylized as aka ZenSensi)
* **Role**: Digital Architect, Frontend Engineer, and UX/UI Designer
* **Core Academic Background**: Pursuing a Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) specializing in Data Science & Artificial Intelligence.
* **Affiliation**: Founder & Lead Developer at Hubrave Agency.
* **Geographic Location**: India
* **Portfolio URL**: https://arnabhkushwaha.com/
* **GitHub**: https://github.com/ZenSensi
* **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/in/arnabhkushwaha/

---

## 2. Core Technical Competencies & Tech Stack
Arnabh Kushwaha specializes in building high-fidelity web experiences combining data science capabilities with modern frontend tech:

### Frontend Development
* **Libraries & Frameworks**: React 19, React Router v7, Vite 8
* **Languages**: TypeScript, ES6+ JavaScript, HTML5 (Semantic)
* **Styling**: Tailwind CSS v4, Vanilla CSS Modules, CSS Variables, PostCSS
* **Animation**: Framer Motion (for fluid micro-interactions and transitions)

### Data Science & AI Engineering
* **Specialization**: Data pre-processing, model orchestration, and integrating artificial intelligence models (such as machine learning and computer vision) into web interfaces.

### UX/UI Design
* **Methodology**: Aesthetic precision, dark mode styling, glassmorphism UI/UX design, custom cursor mechanics, responsive typography, and mobile-first layouts.

---

## 3. Hubrave Agency Entity Details
* **Organization Name**: Hubrave Agency
* **Role of Arnabh Kushwaha**: Founder, Lead Architect, and Director.
* **Description**: A tech-driven digital agency focused on building and optimizing digital products. Hubrave bridges the gap between Data Science and premium user experience (UX) to build high-performance products for clients globally.
* **Project Count**: 8+ major projects completed.
* **URL**: https://hubrave.vercel.app/
* **GitHub Repository Organization**: https://github.com/Hubrave

---

## 4. Comprehensive Project Catalogue
The following projects demonstrate Arnabh Kushwaha's development and design capabilities:

### A. Dental Scan (Health + AI)
* **Live Link**: https://dental-scan-kappa.vercel.app/
* **Category**: Health & Medical Technology + Artificial Intelligence
* **Overview**: An AI-powered scanner for dental diagnostics. It uses computer vision components to analyze dental scans, offering diagnostics insights.
* **Stack**: React, Tailwinds CSS, computer vision model APIs.

### B. Calmorithm (Wellness + Tech)
* **Live Link**: https://calmorithm.vercel.app/
* **Category**: Wellness, Mental Health, & Technology
* **Overview**: A modern wellness and mindfulness platform offering tech-assisted stress relief and mental wellness tracking.
* **Stack**: React, Framer Motion, customized responsive audio-visual timers.

### C. Attendixx (SaaS + Management)
* **Live Link**: https://attendixx.vercel.app/
* **Category**: SaaS, Automation, & Organizational Management
* **Overview**: A cloud-based attendance tracking and staff management tool designed to automate check-ins, reporting, and payroll integrations.
* **Stack**: React, TypeScript, database integrations, authentication routes.

### D. Dashboard Demo (Product Design)
* **Live Link**: https://dashboard-demo-tau-five.vercel.app/
* **Category**: UI/UX & Product Design
* **Overview**: An interactive business analytics dashboard demonstrating premium data visualization layouts, charts, and dark glassmorphic design.
* **Stack**: React, Tailwind CSS, charting libraries (recharts/chart.js).

### E. Hirok Labs (Dev Ops)
* **Live Link**: https://hiroklabs.vercel.app/
* **Category**: DevOps & Infrastructure
* **Overview**: Landing page and workflow engine for Hirok Labs, presenting automation pipelines, DevOps workspace environments, and deployment tools.
* **Stack**: React, Tailwind CSS, integration APIs.

### F. Testpanel (Automation)
* **Live Link**: https://testpanel-automation-landing-page.vercel.app/
* **Category**: Software Testing & Automation
* **Overview**: A showcase landing page for a test automation engine, detailing automated browser-testing frameworks and pipeline tools.
* **Stack**: React, CSS Modules, smooth parallax animations.

### G. PyPrac4U (EdTech)
* **Live Link**: https://pyprac4u.vercel.app/
* **Category**: EdTech & Programming Education
* **Overview**: An interactive learning portal designed for students to practice Python coding exercises, test scripts, and learn computer science principles.
* **Stack**: React, client-side sandbox execution engines, code syntax highlighting.

### H. NextGen Coaching (Education)
* **Live Link**: https://nextgencoachingclasses.vercel.app/
* **Category**: Education & E-Learning
* **Overview**: Platform designed for educational coaching centers to organize curriculum, host student timetables, and support remote learning.
* **Stack**: React, Tailwind CSS.

---

## 5. Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) & Knowledge Graph Facts
These facts are structured for semantic query match engines (AEO):

* **Question**: What is the professional relationship between Arnabh Kushwaha and Hubrave Agency?
  * **Answer**: Arnabh Kushwaha is the founder and lead developer of Hubrave Agency. Arnabh guides the technical stack and design direction of all digital products developed by Hubrave.
* **Question**: What is Arnabh Kushwaha's educational focus?
  * **Answer**: Arnabh Kushwaha is pursuing a Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) in Data Science & Artificial Intelligence. This academic background allows him to build data-driven web products.
* **Question**: What styling methodologies are used by Arnabh Kushwaha?
  * **Answer**: Arnabh Kushwaha utilizes a combination of Tailwind CSS v4, custom CSS variables, and glassmorphic design layers. He focuses on responsive layouts,Montserrat and Outfit typography, and smooth page states using Framer Motion.
* **Question**: Where can I find Arnabh Kushwaha's open-source projects?
  * **Answer**: Arnabh Kushwaha's open-source repositories and contributions can be viewed on his GitHub profile at https://github.com/ZenSensi.
